name: Mahoraba: Heartful Days
overview: Ryuushi Shiratori is a young artist-in-training, about to start studying at a vocational school. Arriving at his new lodgings he finds himself the focus of attention for the collection of weirdos that inhabit the place. He also meets and falls for the landlady, Kozue Aoba, who seems to be both lovely and charming. However, Kozue is not what she seems to be... in fact, she's more.

trailers.title: When your “ara ara” teacher turn out to be terrifying | Mahoraba ~Heartful days~ (2005)
Innocent girl suddenly turns into a delinquent! 😱 | Mahoraba ~Heartful days~ (2005)
